name: order_lines
title: Order Lines
description: Line items belonging to one order. line_total_cents and line_tax_cents are stamped by the order_totals handler on every create/update/delete. See objects/system/order_totals.py.

fields.name: order_id
fields.label: Order
fields.help: Set once at creation and not intended to change after. Not schema read_only -- same reason as app-invoices' invoice_lines.invoice_id: a required, client-submitted-at-creation field cannot also be read_only on this platform (the server rejects any client submission of a read_only field, even the first one).

fields.name: product_id
fields.label: Product
fields.help: Optional cross-reference to app-catalog's products collection. A line may reference a catalog product or stand alone as a free-text description -- optional, not required, so this package has no hard dependency on app-catalog.

fields.name: quantity
fields.label: Quantity
fields.help: A count/measure, not money -- may be fractional. This is the one deliberate use of a float-shaped field in this package; every *_cents field stays integer. Same exception app-invoices' invoice_lines.quantity documents.

fields.name: line_total_cents
fields.label: Line Total (cents)
fields.help: Stamped by order_totals: floor(quantity * unit_price_cents). Never user-entered.

fields.name: tax_rate_bps
fields.label: Tax Rate (bps)
fields.help: Basis points, e.g. 825 = 8.25%. Optional; blank or 0 means no tax on this line.

fields.name: line_tax_cents
fields.label: Line Tax (cents)
fields.help: Stamped by order_totals: line_total_cents * tax_rate_bps // 10000 (floor, not round).
